subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-02-10
subcodes.first_line: When the believers gather in a meeting and are engaged in the mention of God my heart is there... During our stay in Adrianople, Aqa Jamal and Mirza Ali Akbar Boroujerdy and his brother arrived from a long journey.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @Christ; Christianity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
